Chests.name: Chests
Chests.desc: It significantly reduces the amount of material needed to produce either chest.
AltFertilizers.name: Alternative Fertilizers
AltFertilizers.desc: It adds alternative recipes for fertilizers using other materials, and different levels for unlocking them.
Sprinklers.name: Sprinklers
Sprinklers.desc: It reduces the production cost of sprinklers and lowers the thresholds for unlocking the recipe.
AddMoss.name: Add Moss
AddMoss.desc: Adds a recipe for moss production at foraging level 3.
Fences.name: Fences
Fences.desc: It increases the number of fences produced with the same amount of material.
Rings.name: Rings
Rings.desc: It reduces the production cost for the rings.
Baits.name: Baits
Baits.desc: It increases the quantity of bait produced with the same materials.
FishHooks.name: Fishhooks
Lighting.name: Baits
Flooring.name: Baits
Totems.name: Baits
Bombs.name: Baits
Signs.name: Signs
